name: agent-dispatch-codex
description: Codex-native main-agent dispatch guidance with per-role model profiles, subagent execution rules, and cross-shell tool nudges.

interface.shortDescription: Keep the main Codex agent focused by dispatching bounded work.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-native lifecycle guidance for deciding when the primary agent must delegate bounded, parallel work, while telling spawned subagents to execute directly and report changed files and validation. Generates project-local custom agent profiles with independent model, reasoning, and sandbox settings, plus layered configuration and cross-shell tool nudges for Windows PowerShell and Git Bash workflows.
defaultPrompt: Show the effective Agent Dispatch policy for this project.
Configure which commands Agent Dispatch treats as lightweight.
Configure models for Agent Dispatch worker and reviewer roles.
